posts.text: Spirit Airlines 'Bites The Dust' As All Flights Canceled  https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/spirit-airlines-bites-dust-all-flights-canceled
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: As Xi Jinping’s chief of staff, Cai Qi handles the Chinese president’s security, schedule, and the people and information that reach him. The range of his responsibilities is highly unusual in party history https://www.economist.com/china/2026/04/30/cai-qi-may-be-chinas-second-most-powerful-man?taid=69f5f0a20fdc870001c2a6ef&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: After 33 years, Spirit Airlines has officially gone bankrupt and shut down all operations.

All flights have been canceled and customer service is no longer available.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Fortunately the US Govt ensured that $JBLU couldn’t become a monopoly by becoming a distant 5th challengers to an oligopoly… 🤪
posts.author: hkuppy
